displayTitle: Boba Fett: Twin Engines of Destruction
synopsis: Boba Fett is the most feared, most respected bounty hunter in the galaxy. He only cares about two things: his money and his reputation. So when he discovers someone has been impersonating him, he decides to teach his inferior doppelgänger exactly why he's the most feared, most respected bounty hunter in the galaxy! It's Boba Fett vs. Boba Fett in this 32-page one-shot—a fight you won't want to miss! Twin Engines of Destruction was originally serialized in the pages of Topps' Star Wars Galaxy magazine.
title: Boba Fett: Twin Engines of Destruction
